jcr:content.jcr:title: Discovery Files
jcr:content.cardDescription: Every breakthrough starts with a single insight. In the Discovery Files video series, we rewind to the moments where bold questions, collaboration and perseverance turn ideas into innovation.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Every breakthrough starts with a single insight. In the Discovery Files video series, we rewind to the moments where bold questions, collaboration and perseverance turn ideas into innovation.

video.name: Video
video.overlayHeading: Turn back the clock to the “eureka” moment behind the discovery

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: A molecule’s journey to becoming a medication

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Have you ever wondered how a medicine is created? In the Discovery Files video series, hear from the AbbVie scientists behind our scientific discoveries

video.name: Video
video.overlayDescription: In this episode, we hear from the lead AbbVie scientists behind a discovery for people with hepatitis C virus (HCV).
video.overlayHeading: Cracking the Code of Hepatitis C

video.name: Video
video.overlayDescription: In this episode, the lead chemist behind a discovery for blood cancer shares an inside look at the quest to help people with leukemia.
video.overlayHeading: Turning the Tide on Blood Cancer

video.name: Video
video.overlayDescription: How do we push the frontiers of research in immunology? AbbVie leaders describe how molecular profiling can offer new insights that can help patients living with autoimmune diseases.
video.overlayHeading: Unlocking the Molecular Drivers of Autoimmune Diseases

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: From quick insights to in-depth stories, explore how our scientists and the use of new modalities and technologies are helping shape the future of medicine.

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Join the team working to transform patient care
